name: Riskmonster.com
summary: Riskmonster.com provides credit management and ASP cloud services in Japan. The company offers corporate ratings backed by bankruptcy records, ASP and cloud services, and consulting services; and BPO services comprising digital data creation and data entry solutions. It also provides credit management support services, including RM score and RM credit limit credit indicators; e-credit navi and e-management files that combine credit decisions and continuous management; portfolio and credit management regulation consulting services; corporate credit survey services, and Analyst Monster and News Monster tools; Secured Monster plans; credit management qualification systems; RISMON e-corporate business support services; and shared programs and credit management cloud services. In addition, the company offers Attack Monster sales support services; trainer dispatch services; credit management training services; and training and human resources development services, as well as operates a business portal site that provides ASP and cloud versions of desknet's groupware. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
